_schema.description: Ares shadow mode log. One record per would-be entry (no capital deployed).

fields.entry_price: float â€” close or limit price at classification
fields.signals: dict â€” full engine signal snapshot at classification
fields.would_have_traded: bool â€” true if all gates passed (macro + ownership + budget)
fields.skip_reason: string|null â€” why trade was skipped if would_have_traded=false
fields.outcome_tagged: bool â€” true once forward return has been recorded
fields.forward_return_Nd: float|null â€” N-day return from entry_price (filled in later)

_schema.gate_for_live_capital: 30 shadow classifications per engine before live capital allowed
